_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the rpa-executor-service-disconnect scenario. The agent chains folders list -> jobs list --state Faulted -> jobs get -> jobs logs -> jobs history -> jobs list (intermittency) -> machines list. Discriminating evidence: the message is 'Job faulted due to service shutdown or disconnect' (a transient robot-service event, NOT a logon code / session-timeout / slot / console / quota), history is Pending->Running->Faulted after ~68s of runtime, and prior NightlyPost runs on the same host BATCH-BOT-02 succeeded — an intermittent transient. Shared fix: rerun (rerun-class playbook). Specific rules precede generic ones (first-match-wins).

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any unmatched uip command returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
